ddls:
CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate data entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "anomaly" REAL /* Anomaly value (deviation from the historical average) */,
  "historic_avg" REAL /* Historical average temperature */,
  "actual_avg" REAL /* Actual average temperature */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., ocean, land) */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the data point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the data point */,
  "location" TEXT /* Descriptive location name */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_month FOREIGN KEY ("month") REFERENCES months ("month_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES data_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., Celsius, Fahrenheit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year of the data */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Month of the data */,
  "num_days" INTEGER /* Number of days in the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "anomaly_value" REAL /* Anomaly value (deviation from the historical average) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the anomaly (e.g., minor, moderate, severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_anomaly_value FOREIGN KEY ("anomaly_value") REFERENCES climate_data ("anomaly")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_averages" (
  "avg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical average entry */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data type */,
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the month */,
  "historic_avg" REAL /* Historical average temperature */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the historical average */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("avg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_averages_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_averages_month_id FOREIGN KEY ("month_id") REFERENCES months ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actual_averages" (
  "actual_avg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actual average entry */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data type */,
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the month */,
  "actual_avg" REAL /* Actual average temperature */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the actual average */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actual_avg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actual_averages_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actual_averages_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actual_averages_month_id FOREIGN KEY ("month_id") REFERENCES months ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., institution, company) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "data_coverage" TEXT /* Geographical coverage of the data source */,
  "data_resolution" TEXT /* Spatial and temporal resolution of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the report was uploaded */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES report_authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_links_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_links_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomaly_types" (
  "anomaly_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly type */,
  "anomaly_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the anomaly type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author (e.g., institution, company) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)
